title: PBR JG
description: Free HD, realistic resource pack at 256x with PBR shader support. (Java conversion of JG RTX.)
body:
# PBR JG
__Java conversion of *[JG RTX](https://github.com/jasonjgardner/jg-rtx/ "JG RTX on GitHub")*__.

![PBR JG screenshot](https://d26mkv3tdw1wgb.cloudfront.net/minecraft/modrinth/pbrjg_hero.jpg)

## Free HD Realistic Resource Pack
*PBR JG* is a 256x resource pack converted from Bedrock's RTX format into labPBR format.

### Available in Mineways
[Mineways](https://www.realtimerendering.com/erich/minecraft/public/mineways/ "Mineways homepage") includes this resource pack! You can export your builds __with PBR materials__ as 3D scenes to Omniverse, Blender, Cinema 4D, Adobe Stager, etc. using Mineways.

## Mod
Check out [JG Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/jg-mod) for extra blocks and models to compliment this resource pack.


## 🚧
This pack conversion is in progress. Please report texture errors on [GitHub](https://github.com/jasonjgardner/jg-rtx/issues/new/choose) or in [Discord](https://discord.com/channels/846064688491528193/852647334533267466).
